no_data_for_advice: Not enough data to provide advice.
advice_good_planting_today: Good conditions for planting today. The soil will be moist.
advice_hot_and_rainy_today: Hot and potentially rainy today. Be prepared for humid conditions.
advice_hot_dry_today: Hot and dry today. Consider irrigating your crops.
outlook_normal: Next {{days}} days: Conditions look stable. Continue with normal farming activities.
outlook_hot_and_dry: Next {{days}} days: Hot and dry weather expected. Plan irrigation systems and consider drought-resistant crops. Store water for livestock.
outlook_dry: Next {{days}} days: Dry weather expected. Plan irrigation systems.
outlook_cold_and_rainy: Next {{days}} days: Cold and rainy weather expected. Check drainage and protect vulnerable crops from cold.
outlook_rainy: Next {{days}} days: Rainy weather expected. Ensure proper drainage in fields.
outlook_hot: Next {{days}} days: Hot weather expected. Ensure crops are adequately watered.
outlook_cold: Next {{days}} days: Cold weather expected. Protect crops from potential frost.
two_month_outlook_normal: The climate outlook for the next two months appears stable and normal for the season. Continue with your standard planting and harvesting schedules. Monitor weekly forecasts for any short-term changes. This is a good period for regular field maintenance.
two_month_outlook_hot_dry: A hot and dry season is anticipated over the next two months. Farmers should prepare for extensive irrigation by checking and maintaining pumps, pipes, and sprinklers. It is advisable to plan for water storage solutions like ponds or tanks. Consider planting drought-resistant crop varieties. For livestock, ensure access to shade and a reliable water supply.
two_month_outlook_rainy_season: A rainy season is expected for the next two months. This is a good time for planting crops that require a lot of water. However, ensure fields have proper drainage systems to prevent waterlogging and root rot. Prepare for potential soil erosion by using cover crops or terracing on slopes. It's also a good time to harvest rainwater.
primary_recommendation_normal: Next {{days}} days: Weather conditions are stable. Continue with normal farming activities and monitor for any changes.
primary_recommendation_hot: Next {{days}} days: Hot weather expected. Ensure crops get sufficient water and provide shade for livestock.
primary_recommendation_dry: Next {{days}} days: Dry weather expected. Plan irrigation systems and consider drought-resistant crops. Store water for livestock.

irrigation_planning.title: Irrigation Planning
irrigation_planning.text: Next 16 days: Low rainfall expected. Plan irrigation schedules

heatwave.title: Heatwave Alert
heatwave.text: High temperatures expected for the next 3 days. Ensure crops are well-watered.

cold_snap.title: Cold Snap Warning
cold_snap.text: Low temperatures expected. Protect sensitive crops from potential frost.

heavy_rain.title: Heavy Rain Expected
heavy_rain.text: High chance of heavy rain for 3+ days. Check for proper field drainage.

normal.title: Normal Conditions
normal.text: Weather conditions are stable. No special alerts at this time.
